description: CompositionGreen polka dot kurta made of 100% cotton, with floral print along the length from the shoulder to the hem and at the hem, three-quarter set-in sleeeves, double V-neck, multi-coloured tape detailing along the hem and neckline, and has pleats at the centre bustFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed green kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this printed kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose light purple or white kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
